calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing. The Personal Representative Shall File Either A Petition For Order For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report Of Status Of Administration Pursuant To Prob. Code Sec.12200 Et Seq. Two Weeks Before The Hearing Date.
Off Calendar Jun-20-2025 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees
Off Calendar Jun-24-2025 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-08-2025 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-25-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-06-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Jun-09-2023 is admitted to probate. Frank J. Lesser is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Michael Kasolas is appointed Probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Mar-25-2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Stephen Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Svahlin. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-09-2024 Continued To Feb-06-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
